## Microsoft rises 1.8% as Nasdaq falls; valuation discount draws investor interest

MSFT exhibiting defensive relative strength on a tech-down day is consistent with its positioning as a large-cap AI bellwether with perceived valuation support; if the discount narrative sustains, it could attract incremental flows on risk-off sessions.

- MSFT gained approximately 1.8% on a day when the Nasdaq declined — notable relative strength.
- Coverage attributes the move to investors focusing on a perceived valuation discount; no new business catalyst cited.
- No product announcement, deal, or guidance change is implied in the headline.
- The 1.8% figure and Nasdaq-down context are both directly from the headline.
